issue_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Simulating a crash after a partial/torn record write does not corrupt recovery.
The torn record is detected and discarded.
covered_by: TestCrashInjectionRecovery (asserts torn bytes never appear as a replayed record)

issue_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Recovery proceeds from the last valid record.
covered_by: TestCrashInjectionRecovery (asserts all pre-crash valid records are applied, and Replay returns nil, not an error)

issue_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Test spec: truncate/corrupt the tail of a segment mid-record, run recovery, assert clean state with no panic and no corrupted-record replay.

deferred_gaps.description: OpenWriter's resume path did not validate a resumed segment's tail for torn/incomplete records.
deferred_gaps.closure: OpenWriter now reads+validates the resumed segment before reopening for append; truncates a torn tail, fails closed on real corruption.

deferred_gaps.description: TestFsyncBeforeApply proves ordering, not literal fsync-occurrence; needs a real process-boundary test.
deferred_gaps.closure: Subprocess re-exec, SIGKILL self-kill immediately after Append returns, parent re-reads from a separate process. Documented limitation: proves no in-Go/process-local buffering, not physical-disk fsync durability (would require power-loss/VM testing).
Flips a payload byte mid-log (not at the tail); asserts Replay returns a hard, clear CRC error at exactly that record, having applied all prior records exactly once, none after.

deferred_gaps.description: Writer lacks a public Offset()/Size() getter a real checkpoint caller would need.
covered_by: TestFsyncDurabilitySubprocessCrash (uses Offset() to size-check the appended record)
deferred_gaps.closure: Added Writer.Offset() int64, a minimal, mutex-guarded getter mirroring the existing SegmentNum(). No other API changes.

regression_guard: record_test.go's existing tests (encode/decode roundtrip, fsync-before-apply, apply-error durability, append-failure-skips-apply)
checkpoint_test.go's existing tests (manifest roundtrip, archivable segments, load-checkpoint-no-manifest)
